publishedAbstract: * The `mkfs`command required to construct a file system on the top of an iSCSI block device provisioned by OpenShift Container Storage hangs: mkfs.xfs-i size=512-n size=8192 /dev/mapper/mapthX * An `strace`captured on this process shows that the hanging occurs at the writing phase: write(4
publishedTitle: Why is the mkfs.xfs Command Hanging When Executed on iSCSI Block Devices Coming from Openshift Container Storage?
